name: Byron Richards
bio: Byron Richards serves as the Mayor of Groveton, the county seat of Trinity County. Groveton is a small East Texas community with a timber and ranching heritage located in the heart of the Piney Woods. The mayor presides over city council meetings and works to maintain essential city services for the community.
campaignPromises: Maintain essential city services on a responsible budget
Improve city roads and water infrastructure
Support local businesses and job retention
Enhance public safety and emergency response
Promote community events and civic engagement
